top_signals.title: Putin likely to escalate Ukraine war, despite Trump peace push, sources say
top_signals.summary: Ukraine's recent drone strikes on Russia's oil refineries and ports have strengthened his resolve to keep fighting for now.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Germany to buy US Tomahawks in shift toward own long-range capability
top_signals.summary: Germany will purchase Tomahawk cruise missiles from the United States and station them on German soil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran says it hits U.S. military targets in Gulf, buries slain leader Khamenei - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Iran says it hits U.S. military targets in Gulf, buries slain leader Khamenei  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin rebound remains a bear-market recovery, not a trend reversal
top_signals.summary: CryptoQuant said bitcoin's recent rebound should be viewed as a bear-market recovery rather than a trend reversal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: China taps ex-officials to discern Trump’s aims and U.S. elections
top_signals.summary: Their visit to the U.S. underscores how much uncertainty remains around the truce the two sides signed last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lenders seek $700 million after Japanese payments firm’s collapse
top_signals.summary: The financial failure of Osaka-based Zentoshin has left 63 creditors with claims totaling ¥115.16 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Power struggle unfolding among ex-Abe faction members
top_signals.summary: Those who were considered to be the five leading figures of the faction, which was at the center of the LDP's slush fund scandal, have regained power under Takaichi.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
